page: Amazon Web Services mac2-m2.metal is a bare metal instance featuring the Apple M2 silicon architecture. It is equipped with 8 physical cores and 8 virtual CPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.5 GHz with a dedicated CPU allocation. The system includes 24.0 GB of unified memory, providing 3.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include integrated local storage or dedicated GPU hardware.

The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Because it is a bare metal deployment of Apple hardware, it is designed specifically for macOS environments. The lack of bundled local storage means storage resources must be attached externally. From a cost-efficiency perspective, this hardware profile represents a specialized resource density tailored for macOS-specific compilation and testing, rather than general-purpose x86 cloud computing.

This instance is designed for workloads requiring native macOS environments. Primary use cases include iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS application building, continuous integration and continuous delivery pipelines, and software testing on Apple Silicon.
description: Amazon Web Services mac2-m2.metal is a bare metal macOS instance powered by an Apple M2 processor with an arm64_mac architecture. The server features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at 3.5 GHz, paired with 24.0 GB of unified memory. It does not include local storage or a discrete GPU, relying on external storage attachments. With a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps, this instance is optimized for native Apple ecosystem development. It is designed specifically for workloads such as iOS and macOS application compilation, CI/CD build pipelines, and automated testing on Apple Silicon.
og_description: Amazon Web Services mac2-m2.metal is a bare metal macOS instance featuring an 8-core Apple M2 processor, 24.0 GB of unified memory, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth for Apple ecosystem development.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services mac2-m2.metal is a bare metal macOS instance with an 8-core Apple M2 CPU, 24.0 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: Dedicated bare metal macOS instance powered by Apple M2 silicon for application building and continuous integration pipelines.

24.0 GB of unified memory with 3.0 GB per core

Designed for macOS, iOS, watchOS, and tvOS build and test environments
